title: Chapter 25
content:
Chapter 25

Just like every city had activities during the day, every city had activities for the night as well. Whether it was food or the other type of food, it had everything.

Just because I was in the common district of this city, it didn't mean there were no nighttime activities because the people were too poor.

But then the disappointing reality of this world not having any sexual activities came into play here as well, and the lack of prostitutes was a massive turn-off. Of course, I was never going to visit a prostitute to satiate my lust, but for some... other unorthodox purposes.

But that problem of mine was solved as well when...

"Hey, kid, what do you want?" A burly man rudely pushed me away when I was attempting to enter an alley.

I looked at him and asked, "Why do I have to tell you?"

I guess he didn't like that response. And that was how there was a corpse at my feet. Then his friends came. They didn't like me killing their friend either. And that was how there were multiple corpses at my feet now.

There was no awakener in the bunch, but I guessed this place was too low level for that. Anyway, I got what I came for, so I just stored the bodies in my inventory before they started to rot.

The inventory would keep them fresh for eternity, or when I'd take them out. I needed dead bodies, or more like, the resentment of the dead, to cast some sorcery spells.

I was done in an hour and returned home in time for dinner. As we were having dinner, the group made plans for tomorrow, and I agreed to join them only to be rejected when Julian said, "You need to rest tomorrow. The awakening ceremony begins the day after tomorrow, so you need to be prepared for that."

I nodded and asked, "What should I prepare?"

"You need to be well-rested for your mana to be calm." Sandra was the one who explained the procedure, "If your mana is not calm, it could fluctuate the results, causing your mana rank to lower. We don't want that, now do we?"

I shook my head and asked, "What else should I be wary of?"

"Everything is the same. Since you awakened naturally, your test would be carried out separately. You remember how it was for Martha last year, right? Even when she wasn't sixteen, she was granted the right to attend the ceremony because she had naturally awakened as well." Sandra explained.

That was news. Still, I was more curious about something else. If I were seventeen and every child was supposed to attend the ceremony at sixteen. Then...

"Did I not awaken last year?" I asked. I knew I was taking a risk asking that question, but it was important. I could only hope they would look past it.

"No." Julian replied, "The mana crystal didn't react, so you were declared non-awakened. This year was supposed to be your last attempt, but seeing as you have awakened already, there is no need to worry about that."

"I see," I replied. There was nothing about the awakening ceremony in the basic information of Anemose city, so I was very blind about it, but since I was supposedly present at the ceremony last year, any question about the procedure would, in turn, raise more questions.

Questions I didn't have an answer to.

We ate in peace, and it was time for bed. Sandra approached me and told me that we would deal with my problem tomorrow. I nodded and let her go to her room.

I approached Rayla and asked, "Mother, would you like the massage I offered you for tonight?"

"Why, of course, yes. I am a little tired today as well, so I would love some of your treatment." Rayla immediately brightened up and said yes without hesitation, also throwing in some information I didn't ask for.

"Then let us go to your room," I said, and we made our way to her room. Just one problem, Julian.

He was already in the room, lying on his left side, so he couldn't spot me enter. But no doubt, Rayla would be loud enough to wake him up if he were already asleep.

For that, I had an answer as well.

"Why don't you remove your clothes, mother?" I asked.

"All of them?" Rayla asked.

"Yes," I replied.

"Okay." She replied and began to undress. While she was busy doing so, I approached Julian as lightly as I could and purchased an item from the shop.

[Heavy sleeper]

[Type: Consumable]

[Rank: D]

[Effect: Whoever the patch is attached to cannot wake up for at least six hours]

[Warning: Intense stimulations can lower the effect of the item]

[Cost: 1000 SC]

I attached the patch to his neck and watched it disappear inside his body. I sighed as I didn't know how his mana would react. I could have used my mana to knock him out, but I didn't want to leave a trace yet. Although I was stronger in terms of mana, he was still stronger than I.

Or so I thought.

So, without taking any risks, I opted for the safer choice, which was a hundred times better.

Once the annoyance known as Julian was taken care of, I approached Rayla, who had taken off her clothes and was showing me her body in full glory without even knowing what it meant.

I held myself back and let her take her spot on the mattress on the floor. Once she was lying down in a straight position on her back, I asked her to raise her legs.

"How?" She was clueless and raised me to the sky in an L-shape.

That would have been okay if I were just penetrating, but I needed something else before that as well, so I positioned her myself. Bringing her legs down, I adjusted her position in a V shape until her pussy slit was in my clear view and no longer buried between her immense thighs.

I had seen it before and even fingered it before, but seeing it once again made me gulp out loud.

"Then, I'll begin," I said as I dived in with anticipation.

"Aaannhh~~~" A long but light moan left her lips as I gave her pussy slit a long lick only from the outside. The way she trembled showed how sensitive her body was. I didn't even need to apply mana to enhance her stimulation.

"Ahng~"

"Ahynn~~"

"Hmmm~~~"

"Haa... Haa..."

As I hungrily drank all her juices, she took deep breaths to calm herself down.

"That was... amazing... sweetie," Rayla said with a smile on her face, and that smile, enhanced by the moonlight entering the room, only fueled my desire even more.

"We're not done yet, Mother," I said. She thought that was the end of it, but she couldn't have been more wrong.

"We're not?" She asked but her face immediately turned to that of shock when I shoved one finger inside of her tight pussy.

"Aahhh!!!"

Her breath got caught in her windpipe when I wiggled my finger inside of her tight pussy. I swear, even the virgins of the Yin sect didn't have such a tight pussy and they worked out crazily.

I pulled my finger out and pushed it inside of her again, this time applying a little more force, pushing it at least two knuckles inside.

"Aaahhh!!!!"

She moaned out loud once again, louder than ever before. Her pussy was not only tight, it was quite sensitive after my tongue play as well. With how sensitive she was, it was no surprise that this was extra stimulating for her.

But I had no mercy for her. I couldn't afford to have any. I was too far gone into my lust, and I couldn't wait any longer. So, without hesitation, I parted her legs and looked at her still quivering pussy.

And so...

[State of completion has been activated]

~~

Not trying to tease, but only one chapter today. I'm a little tired and feverish to focus properly.
